lume — vendored Swift wrapper around Apple's Virtualization.framework

Upstream:    https://github.com/trycua/cua
Subpath:     libs/lume
Pinned at:   d422294b848afec99b979ac1229446c83fa44807
Lume version: 0.3.9 (per libs/lume/VERSION)
License:     MIT — see vendor/lume.LICENSE.md
Vendored:    2026-05-05

Why vendored: see docs/decisions/0001-engine-lume.md.

Modification policy:
- Don't edit files under vendor/lume/ in place.
- If patches are needed, add them under vendor/lume.patches/ and apply
  during scripts/build-lume.sh.
- To re-vendor at a newer commit, re-run the sparse checkout pattern:
    git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout --depth=1 \
      https://github.com/trycua/cua.git /tmp/cua-staging
    cd /tmp/cua-staging
    git sparse-checkout init --cone
    git sparse-checkout set libs/lume
    git checkout HEAD
    cp -R libs/lume <splites>/vendor/lume   # after rm -rf the old one
    git cat-file -p HEAD:LICENSE.md > <splites>/vendor/lume.LICENSE.md
  Then update the "Pinned at" SHA above and re-run the build.
